LanguageData.EI_MillOats.label: mill oats
LanguageData.EI_MillOats.description: Mill raw oats into a prepared cooking ingredient.
LanguageData.EI_CookOatPorridge.label: cook oat porridge
LanguageData.EI_CookOatPorridge.description: Cook milled oats into fresh oat porridge.
LanguageData.EI_CookOatFlatbread.label: cook oat flatbread
LanguageData.EI_CookOatFlatbread.description: Cook milled oats into plain oat flatbread.
